name: status-nerd
title: Status Nerd
description: Set a funny status on Slack, GitLab and GitHub at once — pick services, roll a random one, or generate with AI.
author: jnwrnr

commands.name: set-status
commands.title: Set Status
commands.description: Choose services, pick or AI-generate a status, and set it

commands.name: random-status
commands.title: Random Status
commands.description: Set a random status on your default services in one click

preferences.name: slackToken
preferences.title: Slack User Token
preferences.description: xoxp- token with the users.profile:write scope

preferences.name: gitlabToken
preferences.title: GitLab Token
preferences.description: Personal access token with the api scope

preferences.name: gitlabUrl
preferences.title: GitLab URL
preferences.description: Base URL of your GitLab instance

preferences.name: githubToken
preferences.title: GitHub Token
preferences.description: Classic PAT with the user scope (needed for changeUserStatus)

preferences.name: defaultSlack
preferences.title: Default Services
preferences.label: Slack
preferences.description: Services used by the Random Status command and preselected in Set Status

preferences.name: defaultGitlab
preferences.label: GitLab
preferences.description: Include GitLab in the default services

preferences.name: defaultGithub
preferences.label: GitHub
preferences.description: Include GitHub in the default services
